steps.name: Integration test fixtures and helpers
criteria: State builder produces valid proposal state for any wave 0-9; returned state passes schema validation
Engine constructed with in-memory ports returns Decision.ALLOW for a valid Wave 0 tool invocation
Audit logger stub captures log entries with timestamp, event, decision, and proposal_id fields
Fixtures support all subsequent steps: wave transitions, prerequisite gates, data flow, error paths, and status queries
steps.notes: Infrastructure step. State builder, in-memory RuleLoader stub, in-memory AuditLogger stub, pytest discovery configuration are implementation concerns for crafter.

steps.name: Happy path: Wave 0 through Wave 4 (intelligence to drafting)
criteria: Proposal transitions from Wave 0 (go decision recorded) through Wave 4 (drafting active) without BLOCK
Each transition returns Decision.ALLOW with empty messages list
Audit logger records one entry per transition with decision=ALLOW
State after Wave 4 contains go_no_go='go', strategy approved, research approved, outline approved

steps.name: Happy path: Wave 5 through Wave 9 (visual assets to debrief)
criteria: Proposal transitions from Wave 5 (PDC all GREEN) through Wave 9 (debrief recorded) without BLOCK
Wave 8 transition returns Decision.ALLOW only when final_review signed_off is truthy
Final state after Wave 9 contains submission with confirmation_number and learning with outcome recorded
Audit logger records one ALLOW entry per wave transition (5 entries total for Waves 5-9)

steps.name: Wave prerequisite gate enforcement
criteria: Wave 1 tool with go_no_go!='go' returns Decision.BLOCK; message contains wave ordering rule ID
Wave 3 tool without research approved_at returns Decision.BLOCK; with approved_at returns Decision.ALLOW
Wave 5 tool with any section tier_1='RED' returns Decision.BLOCK; message contains 'RED PDC items'
Wave 8 tool without final_review signed_off returns Decision.BLOCK; with signed_off returns Decision.ALLOW
Each BLOCK decision produces audit log entry with rule ID, tool_name, and proposal_id

steps.name: Cross-wave data flow integrity
criteria: Compliance matrix set during Wave 1 state is present and unchanged when read during Wave 4 evaluation
PDC status with tier_1='RED' computed from Wave 4 drafts causes Wave 5 evaluate to return Decision.BLOCK
Write tool invocation after submission immutable=true returns Decision.BLOCK with proposal topic ID in message
Wave 9 debrief evaluation accesses outcome and submission data set in Waves 8-9 without error

steps.name: Error paths: wave skips and concurrent evaluator composition
criteria: Wave 0 to Wave 3 skip returns Decision.BLOCK from wave_ordering evaluator; message matches wave ordering rule
Wave 2 to Wave 5 skip returns Decision.BLOCK from wave_ordering (not pdc_gate); rule_type in audit is wave_ordering
Outcome tag modification when existing outcome differs returns Decision.BLOCK from corpus_integrity evaluator
Evaluate with wave_ordering + deadline_blocking both triggering returns Decision.BLOCK with messages from both evaluators
Evaluate with pdc_gate + deadline_blocking both triggering returns Decision.BLOCK with messages from both evaluators

steps.name: StatusService cross-wave integration
criteria: StatusReport.current_wave matches WAVE_NAMES for the active wave after each transition (Wave 0, 4, 9 sampled)
StatusReport.progress contains correct completed/total count and active wave name at mid-lifecycle (Wave 4)
StatusReport.warnings includes critical threshold message when days_remaining <= 5 during active lifecycle
StatusReport.next_action changes appropriately as proposal progresses (go decision -> strategy -> continue)
StatusReport.submission is populated with confirmation_number and read_only=true after Wave 8 submission

steps.name: State schema integrity through lifecycle
criteria: State dict retains all required keys after each wave transition; no keys lost or corrupted
Deadline blocking triggers Decision.BLOCK when days_remaining crosses critical threshold mid-lifecycle on non-essential wave
StatusReport at every sampled wave contains non-empty current_wave, progress, deadline_countdown, and next_action
Deadline blocking message includes days remaining count and submit/skip suggestion text
